title: 2016-2017 Copper Basin Community Subsistence Harvest Permit Application Process
summary: Applications for the 2016-2017 Copper Basin Caribou and Moose Community Subsistence Harvest Permit Program can only be completed online from November 1, 2015 to December 15, 2015 – 5:00 p.m. Please call Gloria Stickwan at (907) 822-3476 to get a 2016-2017 CSH moose and caribou permit number, or send an emai...

title: NASS Invites Public to 25th Annual Morris Hansen Lecture
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agriculture Statistics Service (NASS) announced today that it will host the 25th Annual Morris Hansen Lecture on Tuesday, Nov. 17, in Washington, D.C. Among the topics explored will be innovative techniques, such as adaptive and network sampling, for sur...
